scripts.dist:win: npm run build && electron-packager . PostAIS --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --icon=assets/icons/postais-box-wings.ico --executable-name=PostAIS --win32metadata.FileDescription=PostAIS --win32metadata.ProductName=PostAIS --win32metadata.OriginalFilename=PostAIS.exe --win32metadata.InternalName=PostAIS --out=release --overwrite --prune=true --ignore=release && npm run sync:exe
scripts.portable:prepare: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; if (-not (Test-Path 'portable')) { New-Item 'portable' -ItemType Directory | Out-Null }; if (Test-Path 'portable/PostAIs') { Remove-Item 'portable/PostAIs' -Recurse -Force }; New-Item 'portable/PostAIs' -ItemType Directory | Out-Null; Copy-Item 'release/win-unpacked/*' 'portable/PostAIs' -Recurse -Force; if (Test-Path 'resources/app.asar') { Copy-Item 'resources/app.asar' 'portable/PostAIs/resources/app.asar' -Force }"
scripts.portable:win: npm run dist:win && npm run portable:prepare && npm run portable:zip
